overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character walks along a sunlit stone processional way lined with palm trees, sphinx statues, and NPC villagers, approaching a grand temple entrance adorned with hieroglyphs.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple forecourt with granite obelisk monument

agents.ego_description: standing near the tall granite obelisk, looking toward the temple entrance, then beginning to walk forward along the stone path

notable_agents.action: villager in white robes standing near the path, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: tall dark stone monument with sun disk carving and hieroglyphic inscriptions
massive stone entrance with ornate columns and hanging banners
cluster of palm trees surrounding the temple complex
large recumbent sphinx sculpture flanking the entrance path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing in a sunlit temple forecourt next to a tall granite obelisk adorned with a sun symbol. The grand temple gate looms in the distance, framed by palm trees and stone sphinx statues. A few NPC villagers in period clothing stand scattered around the plaza as the character begins to walk forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: processional way lined with palms and sphinx statues

events.description: moves past the obelisk monument and enters the main temple courtyard with avenue of palm trees
camera passes by a large spiky desert plant in the foreground, briefly obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone-paved processional way toward the temple entrance, navigating between palm trees and groups of villagers

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered near market canopies, some walking across the path

entered.detail: rows of palm trees lining both sides of the stone walkway in large decorative planters
fabric tents and awnings set up along the right side of the path
series of large recumbent sphinx statues flanking the left side of the avenue

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the main temple courtyard along a wide processional way lined with palm trees and massive stone sphinx statues. The temple gate grows larger ahead as the character passes by market canopies on the right where villagers gather. The granite obelisk falls behind as the camera moves deeper into the complex, maintaining a steady walking pace toward the ornate entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sunlit temple forecourt toward the imposing entrance of a grand Egyptian temple. It begins beside a tall granite obelisk adorned with a sun symbol, with the distant temple gate framed by palm trees and stone sphinx statues. As the character walks forward, the obelisk recedes into the background and the camera moves deeper into the complex along a wide processional way. The scene then expands to reveal market canopies and gathering villagers on the right, while the massive sphinx statues pass by in steady succession. Finally, the ornate temple gate looms larger and more detailed as the camera maintains its steady approach toward the entrance.
